Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
Laboratory results are overall within normal limits, indicating good glycemic, renal, and lipid control. Mildly elevated potassium and slightly low total CO₂ may warrant monitoring for possible electrolyte imbalance or early metabolic acidosis, especially considering the patient’s age. No evidence of significant renal dysfunction or microalbuminuria. No acute concerns based on current data.
